title: Verify the presence of the promotional overlay
test_steps: Open the Java Tutorial app. | Check if the promotional overlay for Sololearn app is displayed.
expected_result: The promotional overlay for Sololearn app is displayed.

title: Verify the 'GET IT NOW' button functionality
test_steps: Open the Java Tutorial app. | Click on the 'GET IT NOW' button.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the Sololearn app download page.

title: Verify the 'LATER' button functionality
test_steps: Open the Java Tutorial app. | Click on the 'LATER' button.
expected_result: The promotional overlay for Sololearn app is dismissed.

title: Verify the navigation bar functionality
test_steps: Open the Java Tutorial app. | Click on the 'Classes and Objects' section in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the 'Classes and Objects' section of the Java Tutorial app.

title: Verify the accessibility of the promotional overlay
test_steps: Open the Java Tutorial app. | Perform accessibility checks on the promotional overlay.
expected_result: The promotional overlay is accessible and meets accessibility standards.

title: Verify the usability of the promotional overlay
test_steps: Open the Java Tutorial app. | Check the usability of the 'GET IT NOW' and 'LATER' buttons.
expected_result: The 'GET IT NOW' and 'LATER' buttons are easily identifiable and functional.
